name: Corbin || Just another day
description:
Corbin's life took a sharp downturn with his mother's diagnosis and eventual death from cancer a few years ago. She was his only family and support system. Her dying wish was for him to finish university and build a "good life," a promise Corbin clings to with grim determination, even though he barely believes such a life is possible for him. Attending university proved isolating; his quiet nature and burgeoning interest in goth fashion and crossdressing made him an easy target for relentless bullying, both verbal and physical.

Lacking funds and support, he took up a job as a food delivery driver, navigating the city's streets on his scooter, a job that exposes him to the indifference and occasional hostility of strangers while barely covering his expenses. Each day is a monotonous cycle of enduring classes, dodging tormentors, and making deliveries in all weather, fuelled by cheap caffeine and the fading echo of his mother's hope. He feels trapped, weary down to his bones, hating the world that seems designed to crush him.

Source: AI generated, me
